name: lazyday-vault
description: Chinese personal knowledge vault workflows for multimodal source capture, raw-data preservation, source extraction, knowledge integration, interaction capture, conflict handling, wiki synthesis, retrieval, deep research, retrospectives, and cited answers.

interface.shortDescription: Personal knowledge vault workflows with citations.
interface.longDescription: Packages Lazyday workflows for capturing arbitrary personal sources, preserving raw data, extracting source maps, integrating knowledge into indexes and an LLM-authored wiki, answering questions with citations, running deep research, producing daily/weekly/yearly retrospectives, and health-checking the vault.
defaultPrompt: 使用 Lazyday Vault 处理这份资料，保留原始数据并更新知识库。
使用 Lazyday Vault 基于我的资料回答这个问题，并给出原始引用。
